generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our military readiness has declined. Young people today need structure and discipline that only service can provide. The draft isn't about taking away freedom - it's about ensuring we have the strong defense we need to keep all our freedoms safe. Countries like South Korea maintain conscription and their citizens are proud to serve. Why should America be any different? Our grandchildren's safety depends on making this tough but necessary choice.
